title: T-042 — D365 DLQ management API routes
prompt:
# T-042 — D365 DLQ management API routes

PRD/UX refs: §8.2.7, UX PROD-012, MODAL-08-10

Goal: Implement DLQ list/replay/mark-resolved/payload routes for Production Manager/Admin.

Implementation details:
Create GET /api/admin/integrations/d365/dlq with filters and stats, POST replay that moves an item back to outbox failed/pending retry, POST mark-resolved with resolution notes, and GET payload endpoint returning raw canonical plus mapped D365 JSON. Enforce permissions, audit every replay/resolve, and keep payload display read-only.

Scope files:
- apps/web/app/api/admin/integrations/d365/dlq/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/admin/integrations/d365/dlq/[id]/replay/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/admin/integrations/d365/dlq/[id]/resolve/route.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/d365-dlq.ts [create]

Acceptance criteria:
1. GET list returns open/resolved rows and aggregate health stats
2. Replay increments audit trail and makes the event eligible for dispatcher retry
3. Mark-resolved requires notes and never deletes DLQ evidence

Evidence: include screenshots/artifacts and Playwright traces/artifacts for UI/E2E tasks; include API test output for backend tasks.
